message:
feat(abi,core): major ABI expansion across glibc, I/O, malloc, pwd, signal, and unistd

- pwd_abi.rs: massive expansion of password/group database ABI coverage
  with getpwnam, getgrnam, getspnam families and thread-safe _r variants
- glibc_internal_abi.rs: expand glibc internal ABI surface for deeper
  libc interop coverage
- io_internal_abi.rs: broaden I/O internal ABI with additional file
  descriptor and buffered I/O operations
- malloc_abi.rs: refine malloc/realloc/calloc ABI alignment and edge cases
- signal_abi.rs: expand signal handling ABI with additional signal sets,
  sigaction variants, and process group operations
- unistd_abi.rs: extend unistd ABI with additional POSIX syscall wrappers
- Add gshadow.rs parser for /etc/gshadow group shadow password database
- Expand I/O native file tests and signal ABI tests with broader coverage
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
